Nature of Business

Zintronix is a technology-driven B2B engineering and product company delivering advanced electronics, embedded systems, and comprehensive test & validation solutions for global OEMs.

Operating at the intersection of complex physical systems and intelligent digital control, Zintronix provides end-to-end expertise spanning architecture definition, prototype hardware generation, safety-critical software engineering, and multi-tier verification frameworks.

The Zintronix Quality Mandate

ISO 26262, IEC 61508 and defence reliability standards delivering failure-tolerant systems for high-stress operational environments.

Product & Systems Portfolio

Automotive & E‑Mobility Control

ECUs, BCMs, VCUs and Battery Management Systems.

Connected Infrastructure & Telematics

TCUs, IIoT Devices & Gateways.

Industrial Intelligence & Interfaces

Industrial Controllers and HMIs.

Acquisition & Power Electronics

DAQ Modules and Power Electronics Controllers.

Engineering & Validation Services

MIL

Behavioral mathematical modeling.

SIL

HIL

Embedded Software

MISRA‑C, RTOS, diagnostics.

Protocols

CAN, CAN FD, LIN, Ethernet, Modbus.

Test Automation

CI pipelines and verification cycles.
